creator: Alex Smith
description: As #1 supplier of oil to USA, Canada's tar sands / oil sands kill the environment, locals, and pollute the world's atmosphere. Three speeches: Jessie Kalman on environment; Mike Mercredi - the industrial genocide of aboriginals; Will Horton on new pipelines, ports and spills in British Columbia's treasured forests and coast. Recorded by Alex Smith. Radio Ecoshock 081205 1 hour CD Quality 56 MB or Lo-Fi 14 MB
